title: Analyst: China's coal-based polyethylene expected to compete with North American shale gas
contentHtml:
上海 – 从现在起到2020年，煤基聚乙烯有望成为中国塑料业发展的重要推动力，将颇具成本竞争力，对抗低价竞争对手中东进口树脂，以及北美产基于页岩气的塑料。
At least according to recent analyst reports and statements, coal-to-olefins (CTO) technology is said to develop rapidly over the next five years and account for a significant proportion of China's polyethylene production.
At the Chinaplas exhibition held in Shanghai on April 24, multinational consulting company IHS Chemical stated that most of China's coal-based polyethylene is likely to be supplied to the domestic market.
Nick Vafiadis, senior director of global olefins and plastics business at IHS Chemical, said that from 2013 to 2018, 25% of China's local production capacity will be converted to coal-to-olefins technology. The vast majority of new production capacity will adopt this cheaper and more competitive [CTO] technology.
Platts, a multinational price and information provider, released a report on March 24 that China will add 14 million tons of polyethylene production capacity by 2021, most of which will be based on coal-to-olefins.
Global polyethylene demand last year was approximately 82 million tons.
Jim Foster, editorial director of petrochemical analysis at Platts, said in a statement that he has heard a lot of talk about how shale gas is a "game changer" for the petrochemical industry. "That's true. But as long as China follows its plan, coal-to-olefins has the potential to have a greater impact than shale gas."
Platts said that by 2020, China will put into operation more than 30 coal-to-olefins and methanol-to-olefins projects. The company said the amount of new coal-to-ethylene production in China is expected to equal the amount of new shale gas-to-ethylene production in North America.
Other analysts have questioned whether some of the announced CTO production capacity will eventually be put into production, because most CTO factories are in remote mining areas far away from China's plastics processing center, and there are also environmental issues involved, including the large amount of water required by CTO technology.
IHS believes that Chinese CTO materials may not necessarily be as low-priced as PE produced in North America or the Middle East, but they will still be highly cost competitive.
Vafiadis said the world is now developing two low-cost regions, the Middle East and North America. This is the first time North America has had such a status. In the past it was limited to the Middle East.
He said that now China is adding competitive [materials] with coal-to-olefin technology.
Last year, CTO technology accounted for less than 0.025% of global ethylene production capacity of approximately 133 million tons, IHS said.
But China's demand for polyethylene is expected to continue to outpace the global market, driving demand for local production, HIS said.
The consulting firm said China's PE consumption will maintain annual growth of 7.1% from now to 2018, higher than the global average growth of 4.8%.
Vafiadis believes that even if China is rich in coal resources, North American shale gas PE manufacturers are still expected to become more efficient exporters than Chinese companies.
He said North American producers have the ability to ship products profitably to almost any region in the world.
North American shale gas will also help local plastics processing companies become more competitive against Asian companies in plastic products, IHS said.
Vafiadis said that with the new competitive production capacity, North America will begin to compete with Chinese companies in the global market for finished product sales. North American producers who produce products suitable for export can use efficient packaging and have low transportation costs, and they will begin to compete for market share globally.
titleZh: 分析师：中国的煤基聚乙烯有望对抗北美页岩气
contentHtmlZh:
上海 – 从现在起到2020年，煤基聚乙烯有望成为中国塑料业发展的重要推动力，将颇具成本竞争力，对抗低价竞争对手中东进口树脂，以及北美产基于页岩气的塑料。
　　至少从近期的分析师报告和陈述来看是这样，据称煤制烯烃（CTO）技术未来五年将快速发展，占到中国聚乙烯生产的相当大比重。
　　4月24日在上海举行的中国国际橡塑展（Chinaplas）上，跨国咨询公司IHS Chemical公司表示，中国大部分煤基聚乙烯很可能将供应本国市场。
　　IHS Chemical公司的全球烯烃和塑料业务高级总监Nick Vafiadis说，2013-2018年，中国将有25％的本地产能转而采用煤制烯烃技术。绝大部分新产能将采用这种成本更低廉、更具竞争力的［CTO］技术。
跨国价格和信息提供商Platts公司在3月24日发布报告称，中国到2021年将新增1400万吨聚乙烯产能，其中大部分将基于源自于煤制烯烃。
　　去年全球聚乙烯需求约为8200万吨。
　　Platts石化分析编辑总监Jim Foster在一份声明中说，听到了许多有关页岩气如何改变石化行业“游戏规则”的谈论。“确实如此。但只要中国按计划来走，煤制烯烃有潜力发挥比页岩气更大的影响力。”
　　Platts公司说，到2020年中国将投产三十多个煤制烯烃和甲醇制烯烃项目。该公司称，中国新增的煤制乙烯数量有望与北美新增的页岩气制乙烯数量持平。
　　其他分析师则质疑公布的部分CTO产能是否最终能投产，因为大部分CTO工厂都在远离中国塑料加工中心地带的偏远矿区，而且还涉及到环保问题，包括CTO技术需要大量用水。
　　IHS认为，中国CTO材料不一定会像北美或中东产PE那么低价，但仍会具有很强的成本竞争力。
　　Vafiadis说，全球现正在开发两个低成本地区，中东和北美。这是北美第一次拥有这样的地位。在过去只限于中东。
　　他说，现在中国正在凭借煤制烯烃技术新增富有竞争力的［材料］。
　　IHS说，去年，CTO技术在大约1.33亿吨的全球乙烯产能中占比不到0.025％。
　　HIS说，但中国对聚乙烯的需求预计将继续快于全球市场，推动本地生产需求的增长。
　　这家咨询公司说，从现在起到2018年，中国的PE消费将保持每年7.1％的增长，高于4.8％的全球平均增幅。
　　Vafiadis认为，即便中国的煤资源丰富，北美的页岩气PE生产商仍有望成为比中国企业更加高效的出口商。
　　他说，北美生产商有能力以能获取利润的方式将产品发运至全球几乎所有的地区。
　　IHS说，北美页岩气还将帮助当地塑料加工企业在塑料制品上更有竞争力地对抗亚洲企业。
　　Vafiadis说，凭借新增的富有竞争力的产能，北美将开始与中国企业在全球市场展开成品销售方面的竞争。生产适合出口产品的北美生产商能够采用高效包装，加上具备低廉的运输成本，他们将开始在全球争夺市场份额。
